← 返回文章列表

Anthropic Urges Industry Coordination to Allow for a 'Pause' in AI Development if Risks Grow

📅 2026年6月22日 📖 AP News 📝 约900词 ⭐ 难度适中
原文出处： https://apnews.com/article/anthropic-artificial-intelligence-ai-...
文章摘要：Anthropic公司提议全球顶尖AI企业建立协调机制，在风险增加时暂停先进AI系统的开发。文章探讨了AI技术快速发展带来的潜在风险，包括人类可能失去对AI系统的控制，以及如何通过国际合作来应对这些挑战。
📖 英文正文

Anthropic is proposing that the world's top artificial intelligence companies come up with a coordinated way to pause development of advanced AI systems, warning the technology is improving so quickly there's a risk humans could lose control.

The company behind the Claude chatbot said in a blog post that as cutting-edge AI gets increasingly faster at carrying out tasks, "it would be good for the world to have the option to slow or temporarily pause" its development.

Anthropic said its internal research institute plans to explore the issue in collaboration with others and "take actions" to help build the systems for a credible slowdown or pause. Anthropic rival OpenAI argued for a different approach, saying that "democratic governments — not private companies acting alone — must ultimately determine the rules, safeguards, and accountability mechanisms."

AI models are getting faster, with rapid increases in how quickly they can carry out software tasks like coding on their own, Anthropic said. Based on current trends and given enough computing power, an AI system could be able to design and develop its own successor, in what is known as "recursive self-improvement."

Self-building AI would be a major technological milestone that would bring benefits in science, healthcare and other areas, Anthropic said, but it "also might increase the risks of humans losing control over AI systems."

The proposed coordination would let advanced AI labs verify that global rivals have actually stopped or slowed their work, "and that a bad actor could not use the auspices of a coordinated slowdown to jump ahead in secret."

The company said a coordinated global mechanism is needed because without it, a slowdown in AI development could let the "least cautious" players catch up and add to pressure on companies and governments as they make tough choices about AI safety.

Anthropic's post comes as the company and ChatGPT-maker OpenAI race to sell shares on the stock market, in an IPO that could value Anthropic at nearly a trillion dollars.

Researchers at the University of Toronto also warned this week about AI security concerns. They showed how AI tools could be used to create a new kind of AI "worm" that adapts its hacking strategy as it spreads from device to device and takes over a vast computing network.

Lead researcher Nicolas Papernot said in an interview, "I think it's really important that people understand that it's not just the biggest, most powerful language models that pose the security concerns."

Papernot agreed that there should be more collaboration between companies, government agencies and academic researchers to develop countermeasures as AI-powered hacking tools supercharge the search for computer vulnerabilities.

"Anything connected to the internet is now at risk because of how low the cost has become to mount these cyberattacks," Papernot warned.

📚 重点词汇表

词汇等级说明：★★★★★核心词汇 | ★★★★高频词汇 | ★★★常见词汇 | ★★拓展词汇

词汇 音标 词性 释义 等级 例句
artificial intelligence /ˌɑːrtɪfɪʃl ɪnˈtelɪdʒəns/ n. 人工智能 ★★★★★ AI is transforming many industries.
coordinate /kəʊˈɔːrdɪneɪt/ v. 协调，统筹 ★★★★★ We need to coordinate our efforts.
pause /pɔːz/ n./v. 暂停，停顿 ★★★★★ Let's take a pause and reconsider.
cutting-edge /ˈkʌtɪŋ edʒ/ adj. 前沿的，最先进的 ★★★★ This company is known for cutting-edge technology.
mechanism /ˈmekənɪzəm/ n. 机制，原理 ★★★★★ We need a new mechanism for cooperation.
recursive /rɪˈkɜːrsɪv/ adj. 递归的，循环的 ★★ Recursive functions call themselves.
milestone /ˈmaɪlstəʊn/ n. 里程碑，重要事件 ★★★★ This marks a major milestone.
collaboration /kəˌlæbəˈreɪʃn/ n. 合作，协作 ★★★★★ International collaboration is essential.
vulnerability /ˌvʌlnərəˈbɪləti/ n. 脆弱性，漏洞 ★★★ We must address security vulnerabilities.
countermeasure /ˈkaʊntərmeʒər/ n. 对策，反制措施 ★★ The government developed countermeasures.
accountability /əˌkaʊntəˈbɪləti/ n. 问责，责任 ★★★★ There must be clear accountability.
safeguard /ˈseɪfgɑːrd/ n./v. 保护措施 ★★★★ We need safeguards for user data.
auspices /ˈɔːspɪsɪz/ n. 赞助，支持 ★★ The event was under university auspices.
cyberattack /ˈsaɪbərətæk/ n. 网络攻击 ★★★ The company suffered a cyberattack.
supercharge /ˈsuːpərtʃɑːrdʒ/ v. 增强，加速 ★★ New technology supercharged development.
🔍 长难句解析
Anthropic is proposing that the world's top artificial intelligence companies come up with a coordinated way to pause development of advanced AI systems, warning the technology is improving so quickly there's a risk humans could lose control.
【语法考点】宾语从句 + 现在分词作状语 • 主句：Anthropic is proposing... • 宾语从句：that the world's top artificial intelligence companies come up with...（that引导，说明提议内容） • 现在分词状语：warning the technology is improving...（表示伴随动作，补充说明警告内容） • 嵌套结构：warning后接宾语从句，其中包含结果状语so quickly that...
Based on current trends and given enough computing power, an AI system could be able to design and develop its own successor, in what is known as 'recursive self-improvement.'
【语法考点】非谓语动词（过去分词作状语）+ 介词短语中的宾语从句 • 过去分词状语：Based on current trends and given enough computing power（两个并列的过去分词短语作条件状语） • 主句：an AI system could be able to design and develop... • 介词短语：in what is known as...（what引导宾语从句，作介词in的宾语）
The proposed coordination would let advanced AI labs verify that global rivals have actually stopped or slowed their work, and that a bad actor could not use the auspices of a coordinated slowdown to jump ahead in secret.
【语法考点】并列宾语从句 • 主句：The proposed coordination would let advanced AI labs verify... • 并列宾语从句1：that global rivals have actually stopped or slowed their work • 并列宾语从句2：and that a bad actor could not use...（两个that引导的从句并列，共同作verify的宾语）
Papernot agreed that there should be more collaboration between companies, government agencies and academic researchers to develop countermeasures as AI-powered hacking tools supercharge the search for computer vulnerabilities.
【语法考点】宾语从句 + 不定式作目的状语 + 时间状语从句 • 主句：Papernot agreed... • 宾语从句：that there should be more collaboration...（that引导） • 目的状语：to develop countermeasures（不定式短语表示目的） • 时间状语从句：as AI-powered hacking tools supercharge...（as引导，表示"随着"）
✍️ 高考写作素材积累

以下表达可用于高考作文，关联话题：科技发展、环境保护、国际合作、青年责任等

come up with a coordinated way to... 【国际合作/解决问题】
提出协调的方法来...，用于表达解决问题的合作方式
it would be good for the world to have the option to... 【全球议题/青年责任】
世界拥有...的选择是好的，用于表达对全球问题的建议
Based on current trends and given enough... 【科技发展/数据分析】
基于当前趋势并给予足够的...，用于论证和预测
a major technological milestone that would bring benefits in... 【科技发展】
带来...领域益处的重大技术里程碑，用于描述科技成就
International collaboration is essential for solving global problems. 【国际合作/青年责任】
国际合作对解决全球问题至关重要，用于强调合作的重要性
There should be more collaboration between... to develop countermeasures. 【环境保护/社会公益】
...之间应有更多合作来制定对策，用于提出解决方案
💬 讨论问题
1. Do you think AI companies should have the power to pause AI development, or should governments make such decisions? Why?
中文翻译：你认为AI公司应该有权暂停AI开发，还是应该由政府做出此类决定？为什么？
答题提示：可以从企业责任、政府监管、国际合作等角度分析。考虑科技发展与安全监管之间的平衡，以及不同利益相关者的角色。
2. What are the potential benefits and risks of 'recursive self-improvement' in AI systems?
中文翻译：AI系统的'递归自我改进'有哪些潜在益处和风险？
答题提示：益处可包括科学、医疗等领域的突破；风险可包括人类失去控制、安全隐患等。建议辩证分析，体现批判性思维。
3. How can international collaboration help address the challenges posed by rapidly developing AI technology?
中文翻译：国际合作如何帮助应对快速发展的人工智能技术带来的挑战？
答题提示：可从建立全球标准、信息共享、联合研发安全措施、防止不良行为者利用漏洞等方面展开。结合文章中的具体例子。

📅 本文日期：2026年6月22日 | 适合高三学生备考使用
